title: pH-Rodo pathogens to monitor phagocytosis in pMacs
steps: Once pMacs have adhered to plate, resuspend pHrodo‱ Green E. coli BioParticles‱ in Invitrogen‱ Live Cell Imaging Solution to a final concentration of 1mg/mL and sonicate in bath sonicator for 10 minutes. Add 100 μL of E. coli BioParticles solution to each well (96-well plate). Place cells in a live imaging chamber (37°C, 5% carbon dioxide, and 95% humidity) of an EVOS‱ M7000 (Invitrogen) at 20 x magnification capture 4 images per well every 20 minutes for 5 hours. Use brightfield images for automated-focus throughout the time course and use for normalization of GFP E. coli images.
creator: Rebecca Wallings
